El caso es que iba a la escuela cada mañana, regresaba a casa y esperaba que todo aquello terminase de una vez.I was in high school, barely moving foreward. I liked several of the classes, but let's see... how do I say it with good words... The guys were not people I liked. Or perhaps I was not liked by them.
